message:
refactor(auth): separate save_provider_credential from IO and add unit tests

Split the save_provider_credential helper so it only mutates the
AuthStorage struct (alias cleanup + canonical set) without calling
save(), letting the caller handle persistence. This improves testability
and allows the async login path to use save_async() separately.

Add unit tests verifying:
- "gemini" alias saves under canonical "google" key with alias cleaned
- remove_provider_credentials clears both "google" and "gemini" entries
  when either alias is specified

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.6 <noreply@anthropic.com>
